name: Glean
what_it_does: A self-hosted RSS reader and knowledge management system with multi-user support, folder/tag organization, bookmark functionality, and planned AI-powered content recommendations. Deploys via Docker with PostgreSQL, Redis, and optional Milvus vector database.
use_cases: Self-hosted RSS feed aggregation with full data ownership
Organizing and bookmarking articles across multiple feeds with tags and folders
Multi-user RSS reading environment with admin dashboard
not_for: Production use (project explicitly states it is not production-ready)
MCP server integration (no MCP server component exists)
Lightweight single-user feed reading (full stack requires PostgreSQL, Redis, etc.)
Mobile-first reading (PWA is planned but not yet available)
best_when: You want a self-hosted RSS reader with full data ownership and are comfortable running Docker infrastructure, and you accept pre-production software.
avoid_when: You need production stability, MCP integration, or a lightweight reader without heavy infrastructure requirements.

auth.notes: JWT-based authentication with configurable signing key. Default admin credentials provided (must be changed in production). Multi-user support with admin dashboard for user management.

pricing.notes: AGPL-3.0 license (copyleft - modifications must be open-sourced). Fully self-hosted, no paid tiers.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No MCP server component. This is a self-hosted RSS reader web application, not an MCP package. Documentation is adequate for a pre-production project but incomplete in areas. The project is explicitly not production-ready (v0.2.5). AI features are planned but not yet implemented.
known_agent_gotchas: No MCP server - this is a web application, not an MCP integration
Full deployment requires PostgreSQL, Redis, and optionally Milvus - heavy infrastructure
AGPL-3.0 license requires open-sourcing any modifications
Default credentials ship with insecure passwords
